# AUTOGENERATED — DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY
# Generated by pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements/production.in
# Regenerate with: pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file=requirements/production.txt requirements/production.in
#
# This file pins ALL transitive dependencies with cryptographic hashes so that
# production Docker builds are byte-for-byte reproducible regardless of when
# PyPI is accessed.  A supply-chain attack that replaces a package on PyPI
# will be detected by pip's hash verification and the build will fail.
#
# NOTE: This file is version-controlled.  When bumping pramanix or any direct
# dependency, re-run the pip-compile command above and commit the updated file.
# See docs/release.md for the full release checklist.
#
# Last regenerated: 2026-04-25

# To regenerate:
#   pip install pip-tools
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file=requirements/production.txt requirements/production.in
